title: Eti Osa Council and Entafield Clinic Launch ‘Smile Lagos’ Initiative, Offering 1000 Free Dentures - FinancialEDGE
description: Eti Osa Local Government has inked Entafield Dental Clinic to launch the 'Smile Lagos: 1000 Denture Project,' a free dental care outreach program aimed at transforming the lives of over 1,000 Lagosians. The initiative that is designed to enhance smiles and boost the confidence of residents by providing top-quality dental care at no cost will
html:
Eti Osa Local Government has inked Entafield Dental Clinic to launch the ‘Smile Lagos: 1000 Denture Project,’ a free dental care outreach program aimed at transforming the lives of over 1,000 Lagosians.

The initiative that is designed to enhance smiles and boost the confidence of residents by providing top-quality dental care at no cost will be held on August 13th – 20th, 2024.

Chief Dental Officer of Entafield Dental Clinic, Dr. Cherry Ozoalor, emphasized the significance of the project, stating that it is specifically tailored to address dental health issues that significantly impact individuals’ quality of life and self-esteem. “Through this initiative, we aim to eliminate financial barriers and provide essential dental treatments to those who need them most,” Dr. Ozoalor said.

“Our commitment to the well-being of Lagosians extends beyond mere dental care. With the ‘Smile Lagos: 1000 Denture Project,’ we aim to transform lives by enhancing smiles and boosting the confidence of individuals who might otherwise lack access to these critical services,” she added.

The outreach will also focus on educating Lagosians about the importance of oral health and the profound impact that dental treatments can have on improving quality of life and self-esteem. By offering high-quality dental care to 1,000 individuals from underserved communities, the project seeks to eliminate financial obstacles, improve oral aesthetics, and ultimately increase confidence, social inclusion, and opportunities both personally and professionally.

The initiative is supported by the Lagos State Government, corporate organizations, health-focused non-governmental organizations, and medical associations, all working together to ensure the success of the campaign.

“We invite all stakeholders, partners, and the general public to join us in making the ‘Smile Lagos: 1000 Denture Project’ a resounding success. Together, we can bring brighter smiles and renewed confidence to 1,000 deserving individuals in our community,” Dr. Ozoalor urged.

Chairman of Eti Osa Local Government, Honourable Saheed Bankole praised the initiative, expressing gratitude to Entafield Dental Clinic for bringing such a valuable project to the area.

He noted that the program aligns with the council’s health objectives and is a testament to their commitment to improving the health and daily confidence of residents.

“This partnership with Entafield Dental Clinic reflects our shared goal of promoting a healthier life for our community,” Honourable Bankole remarked.
